name: ontoship
description: OntoShip — ontology-driven docs + spec-driven dev-flow for Claude Code.

plugins.name: gitmark
plugins.description: md+README+git knowledge base: FTS5 search (bm25 + trigram/fuzzy), HTML+graph generation, code-ontology linter.

plugins.name: destructive-guard
plugins.description: Деструктив-гард: детект rm/git/docker/SQL-DROP → подтверждение y/n (даже в bypassPermissions) + звук/баннер.
